activity_id.description: intervals.icu activity ID whose messages/comments should be listed.

athlete_id.description: Target athlete; defaults to selected athlete in coach mode, or the only athlete otherwise. Format: i12345 or 12345.

include_full.description: Include raw upstream message fields and preserve nulls.

limit.description: Maximum messages to return; defaults to 100 and is capped at 200.

since_id.description: Return messages after this upstream message ID; zero means no cursor.
